content: Run mandatory testing gate - Oracle harness, unit tests, integration tests, linting
Conduct take stock assessment of progress toward R superiority
Perform mandatory code audit using zen mcp tools
Integrate ndarray-linalg + OpenBLAS backend for performance
Build criterion benchmark suite to measure vs R
Refactor IRLS to use LAPACK-backed solvers
Run benchmarks to validate ≥2x lm, ≥5x glm targets
Eliminate memory allocations in IRLS hot path
Replace manual loops with vectorized operations
